notes: Live capture for `productChangeStatus` on harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com includes Shopify's updatedAt skew between the mutation payload and downstream product read. The staged runtime intentionally serializes the effective downstream-aligned product for both surfaces and exposes status-filtered catalog reads from effective local state immediately, so this scenario compares mutation data plus the delayed downstream status-filter read after Shopify's search index converges.

expectedDifferences.reason: The live capture shows Shopify returning an earlier updatedAt in the mutation payload than the immediate downstream product read; the proxy intentionally returns the downstream-aligned effective product timestamp from the staged overlay model.
The proxy and Shopify agree on the downstream product updatedAt instant after status change, but serialize the UTC timestamp with different fractional-second precision.
Shopify returns opaque search connection cursors; the proxy uses deterministic Product GID cursors for staged local state.
